queries.question: List each patient along with suitable vaccines, their age groups and health conditions
queries.sql:
SELECT Patient.full_name, Health_Condition.condition_name, Age_Group.Name, Vaccine.Vaccine_Name
FROM Patient INNER JOIN Age_Group ON Patient.Age_Group_Id = Age_Group.Id 
INNER JOIN Vaccine ON Patient.Age_Group_Id = Vaccine.Age_Group_ID INNER JOIN Health_Condition ON Health_Condition.Id = Vaccine.Health_Condition_Id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?condition_name ?name ?vaccine_name WHERE {
  ?patient a :Patients .
  ?age_group a :Age_Group .
  ?patient p:hasAge_Group ?age_group .
  ?vaccine a :Vaccine .
  ?patient p:hasAge_Group ?shared_age_group .
  ?vaccine p:hasAge_Group ?shared_age_group .
  ?health_condition a :Health_Condition .
  ?vaccine p:hasHealth_Condition ?health_condition .
  ?patient p:name ?full_name .
  ?health_condition p:condition_name ?condition_name .
  ?age_group p:name ?name .
  ?vaccine p:vaccine_name ?vaccine_name .
}

queries.question: List each patient along with suitable vaccines and their health conditions
queries.sql:
SELECT Patient.full_name, Health_Condition.condition_name, Vaccine.Vaccine_Name
FROM Patient INNER JOIN Vaccine ON Patient.Age_Group_Id = Vaccine.Age_Group_ID INNER JOIN  Health_Condition ON Vaccine.Health_Condition_Id = Health_Condition.Id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?condition_name ?vaccine_name WHERE {
  ?patient a :Patients .
  ?vaccine a :Vaccine .
  ?patient p:hasAge_Group ?shared_age_group .
  ?vaccine p:hasAge_Group ?shared_age_group .
  ?health_condition a :Health_Condition .
  ?vaccine p:hasHealth_Condition ?health_condition .
  ?patient p:name ?full_name .
  ?health_condition p:condition_name ?condition_name .
  ?vaccine p:vaccine_name ?vaccine_name .
}

queries.question: List each patient along with suitable vaccines and their age groups
queries.sql:
SELECT Patient.full_name, Age_Group.Name, Vaccine.Vaccine_Name
FROM Patient INNER JOIN Age_Group ON Patient.Age_Group_Id = Age_Group.Id 
INNER JOIN Vaccine ON Patient.Age_Group_Id = Vaccine.Age_Group_ID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?name ?vaccine_name WHERE {
  ?patient a :Patients .
  ?age_group a :Age_Group .
  ?patient p:hasAge_Group ?age_group .
  ?vaccine a :Vaccine .
  ?patient p:hasAge_Group ?shared_age_group .
  ?vaccine p:hasAge_Group ?shared_age_group .
  ?patient p:name ?full_name .
  ?age_group p:name ?name .
  ?vaccine p:vaccine_name ?vaccine_name .
}

queries.question: List the total number of vaccines appropriate for each age group and health condition.
queries.sql:
SELECT Health_Condition.condition_name, Age_Group.Name, Count(*) FROM Age_Group INNER JOIN Vaccine ON Age_Group.Id = Vaccine.age_group_id INNER JOIN Health_Condition ON Health_Condition.Id = Vaccine.Health_Condition_Id
GROUP BY Age_Group.Name, Health_Condition.condition_name
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
SELECT ?cn ?agn (COUNT(*) AS ?n) WHERE { ?v a :Vaccine ; p:hasAge_Group ?ag ; p:hasHealth_Condition ?hc . ?ag p:name ?agn . ?hc p:condition_name ?cn . } GROUP BY ?cn ?agn

queries.question: List the total number of vaccines appropriate for each target
queries.sql:
SELECT Age_Group.Name, Count(*) FROM Age_Group INNER JOIN Vaccine ON Age_Group.Id = Vaccine.age_group_id
GROUP BY Age_Group.Name
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
SELECT ?agn (COUNT(*) AS ?n) WHERE { ?v a :Vaccine ; p:hasAge_Group ?ag . ?ag p:name ?agn . } GROUP BY ?agn

queries.question: List the total number of vaccines appropriate for each target
queries.sql:
SELECT Health_Condition.condition_name, Count(*) FROM Health_Condition INNER JOIN Vaccine ON Health_Condition.Id = Vaccine.Health_Condition_Id
GROUP BY Health_Condition.condition_name
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
SELECT ?cn (COUNT(*) AS ?n) WHERE { ?v a :Vaccine ; p:hasHealth_Condition ?hc . ?hc p:condition_name ?cn . } GROUP BY ?cn

ambiguous_dsl.question: List each patient along with suitable vaccines and what they target
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?full_name ?condition_name ?name ?vaccine_name WHERE {
  ?patient a :Patients .
  ?age_group a :Age_Group .
  ?patient p:hasAge_Group ?age_group .
  ?vaccine a :Vaccine .
  ?patient p:hasAge_Group ?shared_age_group .
  ?vaccine p:hasAge_Group ?shared_age_group .
  ?health_condition a :Health_Condition .
  ?vaccine p:hasHealth_Condition ?health_condition .
  ?patient p:name ?full_name .
  ?health_condition p:condition_name ?condition_name .
  ?age_group p:name ?name .
  ?vaccine p:vaccine_name ?vaccine_name .
} }
  component: { SELECT ?full_name ?condition_name ?vaccine_name WHERE {
  ?patient a :Patients .
  ?vaccine a :Vaccine .
  ?patient p:hasAge_Group ?shared_age_group .
  ?vaccine p:hasAge_Group ?shared_age_group .
  ?health_condition a :Health_Condition .
  ?vaccine p:hasHealth_Condition ?health_condition .
  ?patient p:name ?full_name .
  ?health_condition p:condition_name ?condition_name .
  ?vaccine p:vaccine_name ?vaccine_name .
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?full_name ?name ?vaccine_name WHERE {
  ?patient a :Patients .
  ?age_group a :Age_Group .
  ?patient p:hasAge_Group ?age_group .
  ?vaccine a :Vaccine .
  ?patient p:hasAge_Group ?shared_age_group .
  ?vaccine p:hasAge_Group ?shared_age_group .
  ?patient p:name ?full_name .
  ?age_group p:name ?name .
  ?vaccine p:vaccine_name ?vaccine_name .
} }
}
